title: Active Redstone Physics
description: Adds new crafts that will make the game more difficult and add realism to Redstone's crafts.
body:
RECOMMENDED FOR USE WITH JEI

The mod replaces the existing crafting redstone mechanisms. Adds new items such as a pusher, a hinge, and an active redstone. Now all crafts are tied to using sources of redstone energy (redstone torch). The essence of active redstone is that it allows you to make a source of redstone energy.
